meta.title: Could an EMP wipe out American airpower??
meta.description:
As the world grows increasingly reliant on technology, the threat associated with an Electromagnetic Pulse (EMP) attack continues to grow. EMPs are massive bursts of electromagnetic energy that can be produced by nuclear detonations (as well as through some non-nuclear means). These pulses can disrupt, damage, or even destroy electronic systems, thrusting the target area back into the Dark Ages. 

Let's talk about how America's AirPower apparatus is working to offset the threat posed by EMPs, to ensure the U.S. can respond, even after a devastating EMP attack.
